sql_reader_query.value: @concat('SELECT * FROM ', coalesce(item().source_schema, 'dbo'), '.', coalesce(item().table_name, 'default_table'), ' WHERE batch_id = ''', pipeline().parameters.batch_id, ''' AND env = ''', pipeline().parameters.env, ''' AND region = ''', coalesce(item().region, 'us-east-1'), '''')

body.value: @json(concat('{"batch_id":"', pipeline().parameters.batch_id, '","table":"', coalesce(item().table_name, 'unknown'), '","status":"success","env":"', pipeline().parameters.env, '","item_key":"', if(equals(item().category, null), concat('no_cat_', coalesce(item().table_name, 'x')), concat(item().category, '_', item().table_name)), '"}'))

sql_reader_query.value: @concat('SELECT config_value, notebook_path, environment FROM dbo.pipeline_config WHERE batch_id = ''', coalesce(pipeline().parameters.batch_id, 'batch_000'), ''' AND env = ''', coalesce(pipeline().parameters.env, 'dev'), '''')

value.value: @coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(activity('LookupConfigFromDB').output.firstRow.notebook_path, concat('/pipelines/', variables('resolved_env'), '/', variables('resolved_config'), '/main_notebook')), coalesce(concat('/pipelines/', pipeline().parameters.env, '/', pipeline().parameters.primary_config, '/main_notebook'), concat('/pipelines/', pipeline().parameters.env, '/', pipeline().parameters.default_config, '/main_notebook'))), coalesce(pipeline().globalParameters.global_fallback_notebook_path, '/pipelines/dev/fallback/main_notebook'))

sql_reader_query.value: @concat('INSERT INTO dbo.pipeline_error_log (batch_id, env, error_msg, logged_at) VALUES (''', coalesce(pipeline().parameters.batch_id, 'unknown'), ''', ''', coalesce(variables('resolved_env'), 'unknown'), ''', ''Config resolution failed - all coalesce levels exhausted'', GETUTCDATE()); SELECT @@ROWCOUNT AS rows_affected')

pipelines.description: LLM pipeline: nested_multi_level_coalesce_fallback (Multi-level coalesce() nesting with activity outputs, parameters, and global params as fallbacks)

sql_reader_query.value: @concat('SELECT config_value, notebook_path, environment FROM dbo.pipeline_config WHERE batch_id = ''', coalesce(pipeline().parameters.batch_id, 'batch_000'), ''' AND env = ''', coalesce(pipeline().parameters.env, 'dev'), '''')

value.value: @coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(activity('LookupConfigFromDB').output.firstRow.notebook_path, concat('/pipelines/', variables('resolved_env'), '/', variables('resolved_config'), '/main_notebook')), coalesce(concat('/pipelines/', pipeline().parameters.env, '/', pipeline().parameters.primary_config, '/main_notebook'), concat('/pipelines/', pipeline().parameters.env, '/', pipeline().parameters.default_config, '/main_notebook'))), coalesce(pipeline().globalParameters.global_fallback_notebook_path, '/pipelines/dev/fallback/main_notebook'))

sql_reader_query.value: @concat('INSERT INTO dbo.pipeline_error_log (batch_id, env, error_msg, logged_at) VALUES (''', coalesce(pipeline().parameters.batch_id, 'unknown'), ''', ''', coalesce(variables('resolved_env'), 'unknown'), ''', ''Config resolution failed - all coalesce levels exhausted'', GETUTCDATE()); SELECT @@ROWCOUNT AS rows_affected')
